original_prompt: /autopilot look up for ActivityPub spec, Mastodon API, Misskey API, Fedify, and also Designs, and see what you can implent to the siliconbeest, list from important and useful ones, and implent into SiliconBeest. if you change front end text or something, write into i18n, in Korean and English. Also see if there is something that hasn't been used now and implent them too.
